reasoning: The conversion overall is of high fidelity with a composite score of 0.9727 and programmatic text metrics near 1.0. However, there are two major defects: one LLM-identified issue regarding incorrect list semantics on page 2 (Roman numerals converted to headings/paragraphs instead of list items) and one programmatic major defect involving a bare URL that was not converted into a hyperlink. Since there are 2 major defects, the document requires human review according to the count-based routing rules.

concerns.analysis: The source document features a primary list numbered with Roman numerals (I through X). While the output correctly identifies parts of this list on pages 1 and 3, it fails to recognize the list structure on page 2. Item V is incorrectly converted into a heading level 2, and Item VI is converted into a plain paragraph, stripping both of their list item semantics.
